characters.appearance: Young woman in her 20s, slim build, fair complexion. She has blonde hair tied up in a messy bun with some loose strands framing her face. She has dark eyeliner and defined eyebrows.
characters.wardrobe: Wearing a loose, oversized brown t-shirt with a graphic print on the front.
characters.demeanor: Casual, slightly frustrated initially, but becomes engaged and happy as she learns.

characters.appearance: Digital avatar of a young woman with reddish-brown hair, visible only on the tablet screen.
characters.wardrobe: Not clearly visible, appears to be wearing a light-colored top.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: मुझे English से डर लगता है।
[I am scared of English.]
Character B says: Hello! How are you?
[Hello! How are you?]
Character A says: I am fine, thank you.
[I am fine, thank you.]
Character B says: What are you doing?
[What are you doing?]
Character A says: I am wash dishes.
[I am wash dishes.]
Character B says: No digas "I am wash dishes."
[Don't say "I am wash dishes."]
Character B says: Say "I am washing the dishes."
[Say "I am washing the dishes."]
Character A says: Ah, I am washing the dishes.
[Ah, I am washing the dishes.]
Character B says: Why are you scared of English?
[Why are you scared of English?]
Character A says: I am jobless because my English bad.
[I am jobless because my English bad.]
Character B says: Don't say "because my English bad."
[Don't say "because my English bad."]
Character B says: Say "because my English is weak."
[Say "because my English is weak."]
Character A says: Ah!
[Ah!]
Character A says: I am jobless because my English is weak.
[I am jobless because my English is weak.]
Character B says: That sounded great! Your confidence is improving.
[That sounded great! Your confidence is improving.]
Character A says: क्या तुम रोज़ ऐसे ही मेरी English practice करवा सकती हो?
[Can you make me practice English like this every day?]
Character B says: Yes! Just download Supernova.
[Yes! Just download Supernova.]
Character B says: I will practice with you daily and fix your mistakes instantly.
[I will practice with you daily and fix your mistakes instantly.]
Character A says: Okay, मैं अभी Supernova download करती हूँ।
[Okay, I will download Supernova right now.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hook: Learner expresses frustration with English while doing chores.
- Problem: Learner makes common grammatical mistakes and reveals English is holding back her career.
- Solution: AI tutor gently corrects her in real-time, building her confidence.
- CTA: Learner asks for daily practice and is directed to download Supernova.
